description.zh: 基于 Verilog 实现的五级流水线 RISC-V 处理器，支持 RV32I 指令集，通过 FPGA 验证。
description.en: A 5-stage pipelined RISC-V processor in Verilog, supporting RV32I ISA, verified on FPGA.

description.zh: 设计一个面向 Transformer 推理的 systolic array 加速器，优化矩阵乘法效率。
description.en: Designed a systolic array accelerator for Transformer inference, optimizing matrix multiplication efficiency.

description.zh: 基于 Astro + Tailwind CSS 构建的双语个人网站，纯静态部署。
description.en: A bilingual personal website built with Astro + Tailwind CSS, pure static deployment.
